description: This referenced shoe from woodland is just as smart on the tracks as it is around town. Wear these with your cargo shorts or military pants and your favourite polo T-shirt.UpperLeather upper with strategically placed overlaysPerforations on the toe box and midfootCentral lace upsPadded tonguePull loop at the heelPadded insole for in-step comfortRemovable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticMidsoleRubber midsole for cushioned comfortOutsoleDual density TPU outsole with geometric lugs for grip and traction, a curved midfoot and an upraised heelOutsole reinforced onto the upper as a heel guardShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustUse a suede brush to remove dust from suede partsDo not store in direct sunlight
